nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=42 beats='morning light peeks into the willow hollow and Nell wakes to a warm toasty smell drifting from the potting shed; today is the best baking day of all with Uncle Otter; Nell hops out of bed and scampers down the mossy path'>>

choices.label: Scamper to the burrow kitchen.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=40 beats='Uncle Otter ties Nell's little apron in a bow and props up the old garden journal for sunflower seedlings; first the recipe needs the big clay pot from the shelf; Nell rolls up his sleeves, ready to help'>>

choices.label: Go get the big brown bowl.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='the kitchen bowls stand in a wobbly stack of pots on the low shelf, and the big clay pot sits at the very bottom of the stack; Nell reaches out his paws; he can lift the top bowls off one at a time or slide the bottom bowl out fast'>>

choices.label: Lift the top bowls off one at a time.
Slide the big clay pot out from the bottom.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='a wobbly stack of pots teeters and totters and the bowls clatter down all around Nell, tumbling onto his tail with a thud; nothing breaks and nobody is hurt; Uncle Otter chuckles, says one at a time, little paws, and helps him stack the tower back up'>>

choices.label: Try the bowl shelf again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Nell lifts the bowls off one by one, steady and slow, until the big clay pot is free; he carries it to the table like a treasure; Uncle Otter gives his ears a proud pat; next the old garden journal says dark crumbly soil'>>

choices.label: Fetch the flour crock.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='the potting soil bag sits open on the table, full to the brim with dark crumbly soil; Uncle Otter holds the big clay pot steady while Nell picks up the small tin scoop; he can scoop small scoops nice and slow or tip the whole crock over the bowl at once'>>

choices.label: Scoop small scoops, nice and slow.
Tip the potting soil bag over all at once.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='a big white cloud of dark crumbly soil poofs up and Nell sneezes the squeakiest sneeze, achoo, and now he has a smudge of soil on his nose; Uncle Otter giggles and wipes his nose with her apron, saying little scoops, slow paws; Nell dusts himself off, ready to try again'>>

choices.label: Dust off and scoop again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='three soft scoops of dark crumbly soil whisper into the big clay pot, one, two, three; Uncle Otter peeks in and says just right, little baker; Nell beams proudly; now the old garden journal says tiny sunflower seeds'>>

choices.label: Open the seed jar.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='the seed packet glitters with tiny sunflower seeds, and the smooth grey pebble sits on top, saved to crown the biggest bun; Nell hugs the jar close; he can pour the seeds into the bowl in a slow gentle stream or shake the jar hard upside down to hurry'>>

choices.label: Pour the seeds in a gentle stream.
Shake the jar hard upside down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='tiny sunflower seeds sprinkle every which way and the smooth grey pebble plops out, bounces off the table, and rolls away down the garden lane; Nell scampers after it past the toolshed and around the rain barrel, paws pattering, while Uncle Otter sweeps up the spill and laughs her warm laugh'>>

choices.label: Catch the smooth grey pebble!

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the smooth grey pebble spins to a stop against Uncle Otter's slipper and Nell pounces on it with both paws, got it; he trots back to the table holding it high like a prize; Uncle Otter says gentle pours, no shakes, and hands him the seed packet again'>>

choices.label: Pour the seeds again, gently.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='tiny sunflower seeds patter into dark crumbly soil in a slow gentle stream and speckle it like freckles; the smooth grey pebble waits safely in Uncle Otter's pocket for the biggest bun; the old garden journal says the plant food bottle comes next, and it is Nell's favorite part'>>

choices.label: Bring the plant food bottle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Uncle Otter opens the plant food bottle and cups her warm paws over Nell's paws on the little trowel; together they drizzle a slow shiny spiral over the mixture, round and round; Nell licks one sweet drip off his thumb and grins'>>

choices.label: Stir it all together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Nell stirs the little trowel in slow round circles, like stirring soup, while Uncle Otter turns the big clay pot; the mixture hugs together into a soft speckled dough; Nell pokes it and it springs right back; Uncle Otter says now the dough needs a little nap to grow puffy'>>

choices.label: Let the dough have a little nap.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='the dough naps under a checked cloth by the warm stove while Nell and Uncle Otter sip cool lemonade in the big chair; Uncle Otter tells how she baked sunflower seedlings with her own grandma long ago in the potting shed; then she peeks under the cloth and the dough is puffy and ready'>>

choices.label: Shape the sunflower seedlings with Uncle Otter.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Uncle Otter dusts the table with dark crumbly soil and rolls one perfect round bun to show Nell how, smooth as a river pebble; the smooth grey pebble is ready to crown the biggest one; Nell pats his own lump of dough; he can roll neat round buns just like Uncle Otter's or squish fun shapes, swirly spirals and tiny hearts'>>

choices.label: Roll neat round buns like Uncle Otter's.
Squish fun shapes, swirly spirals and tiny hearts.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Nell rolls bun after bun, round and smooth, and lines them up on the tray in tidy rows; Uncle Otter presses the smooth grey pebble on top of the biggest one; the tray slides into the warm greenhouse and the willow hollow starts to smell wonderful'>>

choices.label: Watch and wait by the warm greenhouse.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Nell squishes swirly spirals and tiny hearts, and a bun shaped just like his straw sun hat; Uncle Otter laughs her happy laugh and presses the smooth grey pebble onto the snail; the tray slides into the warm greenhouse and the willow hollow starts to smell wonderful'>>

choices.label: Watch and wait by the warm greenhouse.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='through the warm greenhouse's little window Nell watches his round buns puff up fatter and fatter; the willow hollow smells of the plant food bottle and toasty seeds; Uncle Otter says the wind chime will ting when they are done; Nell can wait for the wind chime or open the door for a tiny peek'>>

choices.label: Wait for the wind chime.
Open the door for a tiny peek.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Nell opens the warm greenhouse's door a crack and warm air whooshes out, whoosh, and the buns sigh and slump a little; Uncle Otter closes the door gently and whispers that buns need their beauty sleep; sure enough the buns begin to puff right back up while Nell hums a waiting song'>>

choices.label: Wait by the warm greenhouse again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='ting goes the wind chime and Uncle Otter slides out a tray of golden sunflower seedlings, round and perfect, steam curling off their tops and the smooth grey pebble shining on the biggest one; Nell claps his floury paws; now comes the very best part of baking day'>>

choices.label: Have a cool lemonade picnic with Uncle Otter.
Take warm sunflower seedlings to the neighbors.
Line up the batch on the windowsill.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='through the warm greenhouse's little window the star points turn golden and the snail bun puffs up round; the willow hollow smells of the plant food bottle and toasty seeds; Uncle Otter says the wind chime will ting when they are done; Nell can wait for the wind chime or open the door for a tiny peek'>>

choices.label: Wait for the wind chime.
Open the door for a tiny peek.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Nell cracks the door open and a puff of warm steam curls his whiskers into silly squiggles; Uncle Otter laughs softly and shuts the door, saying the steam likes to stay in with the buns; Nell pats his whiskers flat and watches the wiggly shapes keep puffing'>>

choices.label: Wait by the warm greenhouse again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='ting goes the wind chime and out comes the funniest tray in the willow hollow, a golden star, a curly snail with the smooth grey pebble on top, and a bun just like his straw sun hat; Nell and Uncle Otter giggle together; now comes the very best part of baking day'>>

choices.label: Taste the wiggly star bun first.
Draw the new sunflower seedlings on the old garden journal.
Show the silly sunflower seedlings to the neighbors.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Nell and Uncle Otter spread the checked cloth under the round window and share warm sunflower seedlings with cool lemonade, just the two of them; the plant food bottle is sweet and the seeds go crunch; Nell snuggles under Uncle Otter's arm, already dreaming of the next baking day'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Nell carries the basket of warm sunflower seedlings down the garden lane and knocks on every round door; the rabbit sisters and old Mister Heron sniff the sweet smell and cheer; soon the willow hollow is munching happily, and everyone says Nell is a proper little baker now'>>

ending.title: Fresh Blooms for the Whole Hollow

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Nell lines the golden sunflower seedlings along the windowsill in a proud tidy row, with the bun crowned by the smooth grey pebble in the middle like a little king; Uncle Otter counts them and every single one is just right; she tells Nell he tried and tried until he got it, and that is what makes a perfect batch'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Nell bites the wiggly star bun while it is still warm and sweet, and it is the most delicious bun he has ever tasted; Uncle Otter tries the hat-shaped bun and declares it scrumptious; the sunflower seedlings look funny and taste wonderful, and that is the very best kind of bun'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Uncle Otter fetches her pen and Nell draws a star bun, a snail bun, and a hat bun right on the old garden journal, next to the writing from long ago; Uncle Otter writes Nell's Wiggly Buns underneath; together they have discovered a brand-new family recipe to bake forever'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Nell parades the funny tray down the garden lane and the neighbors come peeking out of every round door; the rabbit sisters pick the star, old Mister Heron picks the hat, and everyone giggles and munches; silly sunflower seedlings, it turns out, make the willow hollow smile'>>
